zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Streethay於大約1465年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布霍德時，她的父親John Streethay26歲，母親Elizabeth Symeston26歲。她於大約1486年與William Fowke在英國斯塔福爾布霍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1520年在她的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Streethay于大约1465年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布霍德时，她的父亲John Streethay26岁，母亲Elizabeth Symeston26岁。她于大约1486年与William Fowke在英国斯塔福爾布霍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1520年在她的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Streethay was born about 1465, in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Streethay, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Symeston, was 26. She married William Fowke about 1486, in Brewood, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1520, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Streethay est née environ 1465, à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Streethay, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Symeston, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William Fowke environ 1486, à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1520, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Streethay um 1465 in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Streethay 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Symeston 26. Sie hat um 1486 in Brewood, Staffordshire, England William Fowke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1520 im Alter von 56 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Streethay è nata il circa 1465 nel Brewood, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Streethay, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Symeston, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William Fowke circa 1486, nel Brewood, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1520, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Streethayが約1465年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドで生まれた時，父John Streethayは26歳，母Elizabeth Symestonは26歳であった。約1486年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドでWilliam Fowkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1520年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Streethay(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Streethay(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Symeston(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1486년 영국 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에서 William Fowke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Streethay nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Streethay, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Symeston, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William Fowke aproximadamente 1486, em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1520, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Streethay родилась около 1465 г. в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Streethay было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Symeston, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Fowke около 1486 г. в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1520 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Streethay nació aproximadamente 1465, en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Streethay, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Symeston, tenía 26 años. Se casó con William Fowke aproximadamente 1486, en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1520, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
